title: Staged spine cluster projection test isolation hardening
problem: Principal audit post-ticket-317 observed intermittent full-suite ordering failure in test_staged_spine_cluster_projection (overall_coherence_verdict partial when evidence cluster tests run first). Reproducibility is flaky but risks golden gate noise.
acceptance_criteria: test_staged_spine_cluster_projection passes reliably after test_evidence_db_cluster_projection in same pytest session.
No production code changes unless root cause requires minimal hook fix.
rollback_plan: Revert test fixture isolation changes only.
